command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
STATE='/home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator'

echo '=== JOB 78894409 full record ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "cat $STATE/jobs/job-20260625T053201Z-78894409/job.json" 2>&1

echo '=== JOB 16ca7671 full record ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "cat $STATE/jobs/job-20260625T053228Z-16ca7671/job.json" 2>&1

echo '=== JOB DIR CONTENTS ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "ls $STATE/jobs/job-20260625T053228Z-16ca7671/ 2>/dev/null; ls $STATE/jobs/job-20260625T053201Z-78894409/ 2>/dev/null" 2>&1

echo '=== JOURNAL / SYSLOG for crash ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "journalctl --since '2026-06-25 01:30:00' --until '2026-06-25 01:40:00' 2>/dev/null | grep -i 'moreno\|delegat\|python\|killed\|OOM\|error' | head -20" 2>&1

echo DONE_1922
